mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 180 > factions > The Federated Suns Is also home Three House
mechanics.excerpt: The Federated Suns Is also home Three House Entertainment; the only agency of its kind with licenses for travel into and out of the Federated Commonwealth_ the Draconis Combine and the Capellan Confederation New Avalon Publishers, the Inner Sphere single largest book publisher; has its home office on the FedSuns capital with remote pub lishing and distribution centers in every nation_ In the Combine the NAP office loose affiliate of Luthien Press The Lyran Alliance has always maintained a impressive mass entertainment industry: Alliance producers are into every thing; from music and sensory discs holovid dramas Surprisingly, rather than offering escape from the usual grind politics and war fare the Alliance capitalizes on it.
